hooks.command: jq -e 'if .tool_name == "Read" then (.tool_input.file_path | contains("node_modules")) elif .tool_name == "Grep" then ((.tool_input.path // "") | contains("node_modules")) or (.tool_input.pattern | contains("node_modules")) else false end' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "⛔ Cannot read or grep node_modules folder. This folder is excluded to save tokens and improve performance. If you need to find something in the project, search in @pages/, @locators/, @tests/, or other source directories instead."}' || echo '{"continue": true}'

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *@pages/*.ts) DUPS=$(grep -h "async " ./@pages/*.ts 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "async [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*" | sort | uniq -d | sed 's/async //' | paste -sd ',' - 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DUPS" ]; then echo "{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "⚠️ Duplicate methods in @pages/: $DUPS

Reuse existing implementations to follow DRY principle."}}"; fi;; *@locators/*.ts) DUPS=$(grep -h "get " ./@locators/*.ts 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "get [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*" | sort | uniq -d | sed 's/get //' | paste -sd ',' - 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DUPS" ]; then echo "{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "⚠️ Duplicate locators in @locators/: $DUPS

Consolidate to maintain single source of truth."}}"; fi;; esac; echo '{"continue": true}'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for duplicate methods and locators
